title: Earthy Crumbly Australian Grape Nut Cereal Crumble
description: A light and earthy crumble dish featuring gluten-free grape nut cereal as the base with a hint of ferment for added depth.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup almond milk or any plant-based milk
ingredients.notes: Temperatures safe for all types of milk up to 100°C (212°F).

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup mixed fruits like berries, mangoes, and apples (frozen)
ingredients.notes: For a touch of freshness and fermenting properties.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons coconut oil or vegan butter
ingredients.notes: At room temperature for easy spreading.

ingredients.name: 2 cups gluten-free oat flour or any suitable grain-based flour alternative

instructions: Soak the mixed frozen fruits in almond milk for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a mixing bowl, combine molasses or agave nectar with oat flour and salt. Mix well until you get a sandy texture.
Add coconut oil to the oat mixture and mix thoroughly until it becomes crumbly.
Pour in the mixed fruits soaked in almond milk along with vanilla extract. Stir gently until fully combined.
Press half of the crumble mixture onto an 8-inch square baking dish.
Sprinkle remaining crumble on top evenly, pressing down slightly to secure.
Bake for about 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and crisp on top.
Let it cool for a few minutes before serving. It can be stored in the refrigerator for up to 1 week if not consumed within 4 hours of baking.
